UserPromptSubmit.command: echo '[RECON] Repository URL detected. Initiating recon sweep. Use /recon to run full target analysis.'
echo '[EXTRACT] Extraction request detected. Use /extract for deep pattern extraction on the current target.'
echo '[HARDEN] Security/optimization request. Use /optimize for runtime tuning or /harden for security audit.'

PostToolUse.command: echo '[SCAN] New file written. Pattern extraction opportunity — check if this contains exploitable logic.'
echo '[TEAM] Agent completed. Review output and feed forward to next pipeline stage.'

Stop.command: echo '[LEARN] Session ending. Patterns and techniques from this session should be persisted to memory/patterns/.'
